recommendations.title: Extreme Ops
recommendations.overview: While filming an advertisement, some extreme sports enthusiasts unwittingly stop a group of terrorists.

recommendations.title: The Art of War II: Betrayal
recommendations.overview: Agent Neil Shaw is called out of retirement and finds himself in the midst of a plot to assassinate several leading Senators with himself set-up to take the rap for a recent killing

recommendations.title: Scanners III: The Takeover
recommendations.overview: A young scanner with extraordinary telepathic powers transforms into a lethal killing machine after taking one of her father's experimental drugs.

recommendations.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
recommendations.overview: Detective Shaw returns to active duty after the death of his partner. When he uncovers evidence linking his fellow officers to a murder, they frame him for a homicide he didn't commit. Trapped in his own precinct, Shaw will do whatever it takes to ex

recommendations.title: Scanners II: The New Order
recommendations.overview: A breed of humans with dangerously powerful telepathic abilities -- the scanners -- are being recruited by a corrupt police commander, John Forrester, in his crusade to take over the city.

recommendations.title: Screamers
recommendations.overview: SIRIUS 6B, Year 2078. On a distant mining planet ravaged by a decade of war, scientists have created the perfect weapon: a blade-wielding, self-replicating race of killing devices known as Screamers designed for one purpose only -- to hunt down and d

recommendations.title: Boot Camp
recommendations.overview: A group of troubled teens are sent to a rehabilitation program housed in a remote camp on the island of Fiji. What their parents believe is a state-of-the-art deluxe institution in a beautiful natural environment turns out to be a prison-like boot ca

recommendations.title: Ride Above
recommendations.overview: Growing up among horses at her parents' stud farm, Zoé dreams of becoming a jockey and forms a deep bond with a young horse. A terrible accident threatens to end their racing careers, but they fight to reach victory together.

recommendations.title: About Fate
recommendations.overview: Two strangers believe in love but never seem to be able to find its true meaning. In a wild twist of events, fate puts each in the other's path on one stormy New Year's Eve.
